en_title: Gears of War: E-Day PS5 Placeholder Listing Appears Online as Xbox Games Showcase Looms
cn_title: 《战争机器：事变日》PS5占位符上架沃尔玛
subtitle: 扑朔迷离
opus_summary: 微软Xbox游戏展示会前夕，沃尔玛网站出现《战争机器：事变日》PS5版占位符页面，标价99.99美元(约合人民币716元)。该页面已被删除，引发玩家对微软独占策略的猜测。

paragraphs.en: A placeholder listing for a PS5 version of Gears of War: E-Day has appeared on Walmart's website less than 24 hours before Microsoft's big 2026 Xbox Games Showcase.
paragraphs.cn: 在微软2026年Xbox游戏展示会开幕前不到24小时，沃尔玛网站上出现了《战争机器：事变日》PS5版的占位符页面。

paragraphs.en: Reddit user was one of the first to share the discovery when they posted a link for a "Gears: E-Day Standard Edition" available for PlayStation 5 via Walmart.com late yesterday. That link has now been scrubbed of any mention of Microsoft's Gears of War prequel , but IGN was able to visit the link before it was taken down.
paragraphs.cn: 一名Reddit用户最先分享了这一发现，他于昨晚在沃尔玛网站上发布了一个「《战争机器：事变日》标准版」PS5版的链接。该链接现已删除所有提及微软《战争机器》前传的内容，但IGN在链接被撤下前成功访问了它。

paragraphs.en: In addition to mentions of a PS5 version of Gears of War: E-Day, the page featured a price of $99.99 for the standard edition while describing its genre as "first-person shooter" with a pending ESRB rating. Three bullet points – Placeholder 1, TBD 2, and TBD 3 – could also be seen. In other words, just about every piece of text on the Walmart listing suggests the page was a placeholder posted in error, but its existence still has fans scratching their heads.
paragraphs.cn: 除了提及《战争机器：事变日》PS5版外，该页面还标注了标准版售价99.99美元(约合人民币716元)，并将游戏类型描述为「第一人称射击游戏」，ESRB评级待定。页面上还有三个项目符号——占位符1、待定2和待定3。换句话说，沃尔玛页面上的几乎所有文字都表明这是一个错误发布的占位符，但它的存在仍然让粉丝们摸不着头脑。

paragraphs.en: Gears of War: E-Day was announced in 2024 with the expectation that it would eventually launch for PC and Xbox Series X | S – not PS5. Winds have shifted through the last few years , though, leading fans to second-guess Microsoft's exclusivity strategy. As some games, including Halo: Campaign Evolved , trickle onto Sony's rival console, many have believed the new Gears of War game would follow suit, and the appearance of the retailer's listing will only cause those rumors to heat up.
paragraphs.cn: 《战争机器：事变日》于2024年公布，当时预计最终将登陆PC和Xbox Series X|S，而非PS5。然而，过去几年风向已变，导致粉丝们开始质疑微软的独占策略。随着包括《光环：战役进化》在内的一些游戏陆续登陆索尼的竞争主机，许多人认为这款《战争机器》新作也会效仿，而零售商页面的出现只会让这些传言愈演愈烈。

paragraphs.en: However, Microsoft has seemingly walked back some of that messaging recently. While the appearance of PS5 versions of titles like Gears of War: Reloaded had many believing Microsoft was quickly moving away from exclusives altogether, Asha Sharma has signaled a potential change of plans.
paragraphs.cn: 然而，微软最近似乎收回了部分说法。尽管《战争机器：重装上阵》等作品PS5版的出现让许多人认为微软正在迅速放弃独占策略，但阿莎·夏尔玛暗示计划可能有所变化。

paragraphs.en: A mission statement emailed to Xbox staff in April of this year also promised leadership would "reevaluate" the company's approach to exclusivity . One month later, chief content officer Matt Booty warned the upcoming Xbox Games Showcase would still feature competing logos . Sharma eventually called the decision to highlight other platforms "a miss," promising that discussions about how to "adjust for future Xbox shows" were happening behind the scenes.
paragraphs.cn: 今年4月发给Xbox员工的一份使命声明也承诺，领导层将「重新评估」公司的独占策略。一个月后，首席内容官Matt Booty警告称，即将到来的Xbox游戏展示会仍将展示竞争对手的平台标识。夏尔玛最终将突出其他平台的决定称为「失误」，并承诺幕后正在讨论如何「为未来的Xbox展会进行调整」。

paragraphs.en: Just days ago, Sharma returned to the exclusivity topic when she acknowledged that a platform "must have exclusive content and services" during a conversation with Bloomberg . It's hard to say how much influence this newfound appreciation for exclusive games could have on games like Gears of War: E-Day, which has been in development for years.
paragraphs.cn: 就在几天前，夏尔玛在接受彭博社采访时重新提及独占话题，她承认一个平台「必须拥有独占内容和服务」。很难说这种对独占游戏的新认识会对《战争机器：事变日》这样开发多年的游戏产生多大影响。

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, just as the Walmart listing had fans believing a PS5 version could soon be announced, conflicting rumors suggesting that a PlayStation version was recently canceled have emerged. They originate from Giant Bomb host Jeff Grubb , who said that "Gears of War: E-Day was going to be on PS5" but is "not anymore" following an internal decision that "just got made."
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，就在沃尔玛页面让粉丝们相信PS5版即将公布之际，却出现了相互矛盾的传言，称PlayStation版最近已被取消。这些传言源自Giant Bomb主持人Jeff Grubb，他表示「《战争机器：事变日》原本要登陆PS5」，但「现在不了」，因为内部「刚刚做出」决定。

paragraphs.en: So, the Gears of War: E-Day PS5 listing could be our first hint at a PlayStation version of the game…or it could mean absolutely nothing. As leaks and rumors consume an increasingly busy Summer Game Fest, it's probably best players keep expectations in check until we hear from a more official source. We'll at least know much more about the upcoming prequel game when the Gears of War: E-Day Direct follows the Xbox Games Showcase 2026 presentation later today.
paragraphs.cn: 因此，《战争机器：事变日》PS5页面可能是我们获得该作PlayStation版的首个线索……也可能毫无意义。随着泄密和传言充斥着日益繁忙的夏日游戏节，玩家们最好还是保持期待，等待更官方的消息。至少在今天晚些时候的Xbox游戏展示会2026之后，我们将通过《战争机器：事变日》直面会了解更多关于这款前传作品的信息。

paragraphs.en: For more on the future of Gears of War, Microsoft, and Xbox, you can read about the all-caps rebrand Sharma revealed in May. You can also read about , as well as the Game Pass price cuts that arrived in April.
paragraphs.cn: 欲了解更多关于《战争机器》、微软和Xbox的未来，你可以阅读夏尔玛在5月透露的全大写品牌重塑。你还可以阅读关于……以及4月Game Pass降价的消息。

audit_failure_reason: [summary_length] opus_summary must be 70-80 non-space characters, got 85
